title: IS There a Workaround to Subitems under Subitems?
excerpt:
What are some work-arounds to multiple submenu levels? Unlimited Subitems solves that issue, but at the same time prevents moving top-level parent item.

posts.author: VPPR (Barry Koblenz)
posts.cookedHtml:
What are some work-arounds to multiple submenu levels? Unlimited Subitems solves that issue, but at the same time prevents moving top-level parent item.

I need to be able to move projects periodically. Unless there’s a way to do it with Unlimited Subitems installed.
